info.title: Resource Allocation & Workforce Management System API
info.description: API documentation for the Resource Allocation & Workforce Management System. Provides backend endpoints for authentication, employee management, project tracking, resource allocation, leave requests, timesheets, resource availability, reports, and dashboards.

post.description: Create a new user account with a specified role (Admin, Manager, Employee) and send a verification email.

roleId.description: MongoDB ObjectId of the seeded Role

400.description: User already exists or validation error

post.description: Authenticate user credentials, check verification status, and return JWT access and refresh tokens.

401.description: Invalid credentials or email not verified

get.description: Verify the user's email using the token received in the verification link.

parameters.name: token
parameters.description: Verification token sent in email link

post.description: Generate a reset token and send a password reset link to the user's email address.
Reset user password with a valid, non-expired reset token.

parameters.name: token
parameters.description: Password reset token sent in email link

post.description: Request a new JWT access token using a valid, matching refresh token.
Clear the refresh token stored in the database for the current logged-in user.

get.description: Fetch a list of all employees. Allows fuzzy matching search on name, email, department, or skills.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search term matching name, email, department, or skills (case-insensitive)

200.description: List of employees matching search query

401.description: Unauthorized - No/invalid token or missing permissions (Requires VIEW_EMPLOYEE permission)

post.description: Add a new employee to the organization system. (Requires CREATE_EMPLOYEE permission)

400.description: Validation error or employee already exists

get.description: Retrieve the profile details of an employee by their MongoDB ID. (Requires VIEW_EMPLOYEE permission)

put.description: Modify an employee profile. (Requires UPDATE_EMPLOYEE permission)

delete.description: Remove an employee from the system database. (Requires DELETE_EMPLOYEE permission)

post.description: Create a new project. Start and end dates must be valid, and end date must be after start date. (Requires CREATE_PROJECT permission)

assignedEmployees.description: Array of MongoDB ObjectIds of assigned employees

400.description: Required fields missing, invalid dates, or project already exists

put.description: Modify details of an existing project by MongoDB ID. (Requires UPDATE_PROJECT permission)

patch.description: Update project status to 'Closed'. (Requires UPDATE_PROJECT permission)

get.summary: Get assigned employees of a project
get.description: Fetch a list of all resources (Employees) assigned to a project, populated with employee profile details. (Requires VIEW_ASSIGNED_RESOURCES permission)

200.description: List of populated Employee profiles assigned to the project

post.description: Allocate an employee to a project. Validates that employee is not on leave, total allocation percentage does not exceed 100%, and end date is after start date. (Requires CREATE_ALLOCATION permission)

400.description: Employee is on leave, allocation exceeds 100%, or invalid dates

put.description: Change the allocation percentage of an active allocation. Ensures total active allocation percentage does not exceed 100%. (Requires UPDATE_ALLOCATION permission)
Set allocation status to 'Cancelled'. (Requires CANCEL_ALLOCATION permission)

get.summary: Get allocation history for an employee
get.description: Retrieve all allocations (active, completed, cancelled) associated with a specific employee, with populated project details. (Requires VIEW_ALLOCATION_HISTORY permission)
Retrieve all leave requests. (Requires VIEW_LEAVES permission)

200.description: List of all leave requests with populated employee details

post.description: Submit a leave application for approval. (Requires APPLY_LEAVE permission)

400.description: End date must be after start date

put.description: Approve a pending leave application. Verifies leave balance and project conflicts. Requires replacementEmployeeId if the employee is allocated to a critical project. (Requires APPROVE_LEAVE permission)

replacementEmployeeId.description: MongoDB ObjectId of a replacement Employee (required if employee has a critical project allocation)

400.description: Leave already processed, insufficient balance, or replacement required for critical project allocation

404.description: Leave request or employee not found

put.description: Reject a pending leave application. (Requires REJECT_LEAVE permission)

get.description: Retrieve all approved leaves, populated with employee information, sorted by start date. (Requires VIEW_LEAVE_CALENDAR permission)

get.summary: Get leave balance of an employee
get.description: Retrieve remaining casual, sick, and earned leave balances of an employee. (Requires VIEW_EMPLOYEE permission)

post.description: Employee submits project hours for a specific date. Total hours logged for the day cannot exceed 24 hours. (Requires SUBMIT_TIMESHEET permission)

201.description: Timesheet entry created successfully (in Draft state)

get.description: Fetch all timesheets logged by an employee, sorted by date in descending order, with populated project name details. (Requires SUBMIT_TIMESHEET permission)

200.description: List of timesheet entries returned successfully

put.description: Transition a Draft timesheet into Submitted status. (Requires SUBMIT_TIMESHEET permission)

400.description: Timesheet already processed (not in Draft status)

put.description: Approve a submitted timesheet. (Requires REVIEW_TIMESHEET permission)
Reject a submitted timesheet. (Requires REVIEW_TIMESHEET permission)

get.summary: Get weekly timesheet report for an employee
get.description: Calculate total hours and list timesheets for an employee within a weekly date range. (Requires SUBMIT_TIMESHEET permission)

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: Start date of the week (e.g. YYYY-MM-DD)

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: End date of the week (e.g. YYYY-MM-DD)

get.summary: Get monthly timesheet report for an employee
get.description: Calculate total hours and list timesheets for an employee within a specific month and year. (Requires SUBMIT_TIMESHEET permission)

parameters.name: month
parameters.description: Month number (e.g. 1 for January, 6 for June)

get.description: Retrieve all timesheets in 'Submitted' state awaiting review, populated with employee and project info. (Requires REVIEW_TIMESHEET permission)

Group all employees into four lists based on active allocations and leave status: Available (0% allocated), Partially Allocated (< 100%), Fully Allocated (100%), or On Leave. (Requires VIEW_REPORTS permission)
Retrieve organization-wide workforce metrics including employee allocation percentages and actual approved logged hours. (Requires VIEW_REPORTS permission)

get.summary: Get projects status and tracking report
get.description: Retrieve tracking details on all projects, allocated employees, total hours approved, and completion status. (Requires VIEW_REPORTS permission)

totalHours.description: Sum of all approved hours logged under this project

get.description: Retrieve count of approved leaves for each employee and department. (Requires VIEW_REPORTS permission)

Get summary count cards (Total Employees, Active Projects, Resources Allocated, Employees On Leave) and chart datasets (Department Distribution, Resource Utilization). (Requires VIEW_REPORTS permission)
Get lists of projects, assigned resources counts, pending timesheet counts, and pending leave request counts. (Requires VIEW_REPORTS permission)
Get lists of current projects allocated, remaining leave balances, and total monthly logged hours. (Requires VIEW_EMPLOYEE permission)
Simple test endpoint requiring user to have the role 'Admin'.
Simple test endpoint requiring the permission 'CREATE_EMPLOYEE'.

description.example: This is a premium enterprise workforce application project.

assignedEmployees.description: MongoDB ObjectIds of Employees assigned to this project

replacementEmployee.description: MongoDB ObjectId of replacement Employee (if applicable)
